basic_details.job_title: Government Children's Home Kanchipuram Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Government Children's Home Kanchipuram Recruitment 2026: Government Children's Home Kanchipuram has released the official notification for 3 Counselor posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (M.A. / M.Sc.) in Psychology or Counseling
qualification.details: Counselor: Post Graduate Degree (M.A. / M.Sc.) in Psychology or Counseling

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Government Children's Home Kanchipuram Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Government Children's Home Kanchipuram Counselor Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Government Children's Home Kanchipuram Counselor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Counselor position at Government Children's Home Kanchipuram is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Counselor position, candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree (M.A. / M.Sc.) in Psychology or Counseling from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The age criteria for the Counselor post require candidates to be a minimum of 25 years old and a maximum of 40 years old as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: Government Children's Home Kanchipuram is recruiting for a total of 3 vacancies for the Counselor position. Interested candidates should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Counselor post will receive a salary of Rs. 1000 Per Day. This is a contractual position with a daily remuneration as specified.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for the Counselor recruitment at Government Children's Home Kanchipuram. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempt from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counselor position will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Counselor recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Government Children's Home located?
faq.answer: The Government Children's Home is located in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 631502. Applications should be sent to this location as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual job type. The position of Counselor is offered on a contract basis, not as a permanent government employment.
